text.content:
2
*�����������������\searchReplace

A tool for large scale refactoring/renaming, especially if you use Python. Contains the core funcionality of the Search/Replace dialog.

Features include:
- Recursive searching inside COMPs
- Regular Expressions
- Searches/replaces in DATs, par data, field text, tags, op names, par page names, par labels, par names, par menu items

text.content:
2
*�����������������m# me - this DAT.
# 
# dat - the changed DAT
# rows - a list of row indices
# cols - a list of column indices
# cells - the list of cells that have changed content
# prev - the list of previous string contents of the changed cells
# 
# Make sure the corresponding toggle is enabled in the DAT Execute DAT.
# 
# If rows or columns are deleted, sizeChange will be called instead of row/col/cellChange.


def onTableChange(dat):
	ext.SearchReplaceExt.onInputTableChanged()

def onRowChange(dat, rows):
	return

def onColChange(dat, cols):
	return

def onCellChange(dat, cells, prev):
	return

def onSizeChange(dat):
	return
